description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes. The figure has a clean-shaven face and short, neatly styled hair. The shirt is tucked into the pants, which are secured with a visible belt, giving a tidy and casual urban appearance. The hands are relaxed and positioned at the sides, and the overall build is average and proportional. The shoes are robust, suitable for walking on city streets or sidewalks. The figure's posture is upright and neutral, suggesting readiness for movement or interaction in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult male in a button-up shirt, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes, standing upright with a neat appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, button-up shirt, belt, and both hands relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the straight leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and shoes, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted pants, and a belt
